pk_tuples.notes: Duvelisib 25 mg BID at steady state in patients (therapeutic dose); Cmax 1.5 mcg/mL=1500 ng/mL (63.6% CV), AUC0-12h 7.9 mcg·h/mL=7900 ng·h/mL (76.8% CV); Vss/F 46.9L (78% CV); t1/2 6.8h (45.8% CV); Tmax 1-2h in patients; bioavailability 42%
